name: inspired-features
spec_digest: 7 features, 18 work units, 3 parallel waves, 6 new commands, 1 new hook, 1 utility, 4 hookify baseline marks
key_decisions: Budget tracking is advisory (heuristic turns, not tokens) because Claude Code doesn't expose token data to hooks
Baseline hookify enforcement is a convention — we add frontmatter but can't modify the hookify plugin source
audit-log.sh is a sourced utility, not a wired hook — doesn't increment hook count
SAIL_DISABLED_HOOKS uses filename matching (without .sh extension) for ergonomics
